summary: Personal Cabinet & Team Chat feature testing complete. All 25 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tested - Profile, Tasks, Chat, Team tabs all functional. Fixed 2 issues: CORS origin missing for preview URL, and create_channel LAST_INSERT_ID bug.

issues: When no channel selected, message area shows placeholder but channel list loads correctly after ~8s

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Frontend PersonalCabinet.jsx properly uses authFetch with JWT token
✅ MySQL database connection working for both cabinet and chat routes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 tabs working: Profile, Tasks, Chat, Team)

verified: Quick stats (active tasks, done, overdue, messages today)

bugs_fixed.issue: create_channel endpoint returned 500 Internal Server Error due to LAST_INSERT_ID() returning None after commit
bugs_fixed.fix: Get LAST_INSERT_ID before commit and use parameterized query with id

bugs_fixed.issue: CORS_ORIGINS missing preview URL causing 401 Unauthorized for cabinet/chat API calls from browser

seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing 4 default channels (Загальний, Склад, Доставка, Термінове), 1 DM, 9 users, test messages from pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal Cabinet and Team Chat fully tested with MySQL backend. Preview URL added to CORS. create_channel bug fixed. All API endpoints return correct data. Frontend tabs (Profile, Tasks, Chat, Team) load correctly but may take 5-10s due to MySQL connection latency.
